name: Ottawa-Gatineau Cross-Border Commuter Return
description: Complete Marc Tremblay's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\. Save the completed return as 'marc_tremblay.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA T4 and RL-1 Slip Formats 2024; CRA Guide T4044 (Employment Expenses); CTC Rules
metadata.occupation: Government employee (Ministère de l'Environnement) — cross-border commuter
metadata.key_complexity: Interprovincial tax integration (RL-1 Box E to Line 43700); QPP/QPIP entry; Canada Training Credit (CTC) combined with T2202 tuition; T778 child care; Schedule 5 eligible dependant
